rag_rules: Fix AGREE syntax errors by correcting invalid characters like ';' and '[' at line 98 of the model.
Ensure AGREE expressions use only visible AADL features or declared helpers within the same annex.
generic_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes, and implementation bindings in implementation scopes.
Use only visible identifiers and declared types in AGREE expressions to avoid type resolution errors.
Generate AGREE code that preserves type consistency and avoids package-qualified references not in the model.
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponents or ports in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` with correct syntax and types.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables.
Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics beyond syntax errors
Model fusion or component insertion locations
